title: sorbus hungarica
intro: Sorbus hungarica, also known as the Hungarian whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Hungary. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorbus hungarica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Sorbus hungarica can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
